---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new backend, routing rule, or capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: kochj23
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the gap this feature would fill.

## Proposed solution
What would you like to see added or changed?

## Backend / integration details (if applicable)
- Backend name and URL:
- API endpoint(s) to integrate:
- Any auth requirements:

## Routing considerations
What task types should route to this backend? What fallback should apply if it's unavailable?

## Alternatives considered
Other ways you thought about solving this.

## Security review
- [ ] This feature involves network access beyond localhost
- [ ] This feature stores or transmits credentials
- [ ] This feature changes CORS or auth behavior
